title: Optimized Portfolio Draft Proposal
outcome: Major changes: Removed high beta/speculative tickers DGNX, CRDO, OKLO. Reduced allocation to ARM and MU. Eliminated IIPR due to sector/tenant risk. Added new candidate VRNS (low beta tech, $6.7B cap) for diversification. Maintained strong allocations to core alpha/growth positions (APP, AVGO, PLTR, NVDA, NRG, SLVR), resilient global/thematic ETFs (EIS, GREK, SGDM, VCSH, IGSB), and core industrial/logistics REITs (EQIX, FR, TRNO). Modestly adjusted sector tilts, with further ETF screening and alternatives in next iteration. Full new portfolio composition to be documented after analytics and further screener/factor checks.
